description_long: This is a thick, rectangular book with a dark brown cover, reinforced by ornate, metallic gold bands that wrap around its body both horizontally and vertically. The most striking feature is a sculpted, pale stone skull embedded prominently on the front cover, giving the book a mysterious and possibly ominous appearance. The book's pages are visible along the sides, appearing slightly aged and tightly bound. The gold bands are detailed with small, raised geometric patterns, suggesting a secure locking mechanism or decorative clasp. The overall design is reminiscent of an ancient tome or a magical grimoire, likely intended to stand out in an urban fantasy or gothic setting. The combination of materials and the skull motif make it visually distinctive and suggest it may be of special significance or value.
description: A thick, brown book with ornate gold bands and a sculpted skull on the cover, giving it a mysterious, ancient appearance.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the side, highlighting the gold band and the raised skull on the cover.
description_view_1: The front view shows the full skull face, gold clasp, and the layered pages beneath the cover.
description_view_2: The opposite side view displays the skull in profile and the gold band wrapping around the book.
description_view_3: The back view reveals the rear of the skull and the gold band, with the book's pages visible along the edge.
attribute_cover_illustration: A three-dimensional, sculpted skull in pale stone dominates the front cover, set against a dark brown background and framed by metallic gold bands. The skull is detailed and realistic, lending the book a gothic or magical aura. No other illustrations or artwork are visible.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is brown with a prominent gold band running vertically along its length. No text or additional decorative elements are visible.
